The '''Dunsenn FlopCarrier''' was a troop carrier used by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] military to transport troops or evacuate civilians by air. It consisted of a seating block attached to the underside of a massive [[dunsenn]], a fish-like, lighter-than-air creature.
The passengers' compartment was covered by bubble-like canopies, actually hydrostatic fields, similar to those used on the [[bongo]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
